title: ConversationConfig
description: Configuration defining the agent's conversational behavior, voice settings, and language model parameters.

prompt.description: The system prompt and instructions for the agent.
The system instructions that define agent behavior.

first_message.description: The initial message the agent sends when a conversation starts.

language.description: The primary language for the agent.

tts.description: Text-to-speech configuration for the agent's voice.

voice_id.description: The voice to use for the agent's speech output.

stt.description: Speech-to-text configuration for processing user input.

model_id.description: The STT model to use for transcription.

llm.description: Language model configuration for conversation generation.

temperature.description: Controls randomness in the model's responses.
